next_gap.subject: A265:selection_corrected_cross_reader_boundary
suggested_queries: Which exact clause-frequency coordinates were destroyed by all semantic projections?
Do candidate-conditioned solver trajectory deltas align across unseen prefix groups?

terminal_chain.evidence: Materialized after all 2186 modes and all 256 selection-matched offsets were evaluated.

causal_derivation.chosen_test: Convert every reader row to centered descending midranks, exhaust the complete nonzero {-1,0,+1}^7 coefficient family, and repeat that identical best-of-2186 search under every one of the 256 shared-XOR label offsets.
causal_derivation.observed_pattern: The readers project the same 20 complete candidate covers through algebraically and semantically different operators; their individual gains span positive and negative values, so signed combinations can test complementary information rather than average only similarly oriented scores.
causal_derivation.selection_correction: The observed best overlay is compared with the minimum-over-all-modes null curve at every offset; no coefficient vector is treated as prospectively selected.
causal_derivation.user_hypothesis: Apply several inference algorithms to the same cipher evidence and overlay their outputs so coherent structure separates from reader-specific noise.
